166 
ESRD_TRTMT_CHS_IND_CD 
LABEL: 
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Treatment Choices Demonstration Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: The type of ESRD treatment Choices (ETC) Model (Demo code 94). 
SHORT NAME: ESRD_TRTMT_CHS_IND_CD 
LONG NAME: ESRD_TRTMT_CHS_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
H or blank = Home Dialysis Payment Adjustment (HDPA) only
